name: Acorn Squash Rings with Cranberries and Apples
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :12
Cut unpeeled squash into 1/4 rings with a sharp knife. Remove and discard seeds. Place in shallow dish and set aside. In the microwave-safe measure (4 cup), melt butter on high for 30-45 seconds or until melted. Stir in cranberries, brown sugar, and apple. Cook uncovered on high for 2-3 minutes or until skins have popped, stirring once. Dissolve cornstarch in cold water by whisking it into the juices. Return to the microwave and cook on high for 30-45 seconds until thickened. Pour over each ring.
